scripts.dev: concurrently -n host,board,docs,analytics -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/host" "npm run dev -w apps/mfe-tasks" "npm run dev -w apps/mfe-notes" "npm run dev -w apps/mfe-profile"
scripts.build:remotes: npm run build -w apps/mfe-tasks && npm run build -w apps/mfe-notes && npm run build -w apps/mfe-profile
scripts.build:all: npm run build:remotes && npm run build -w apps/host
scripts.preview: concurrently -n host,board,docs,analytics -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run preview -w apps/host" "npm run preview -w apps/mfe-tasks" "npm run preview -w apps/mfe-notes" "npm run preview -w apps/mfe-profile"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/host -w apps/mfe-tasks -w apps/mfe-notes -w apps/mfe-profile
